ui.title: SCF Revenue Currency Analytics Widget
ui.desc: Revenue and volume analytics for SCF transactions grouped by currency.

data.sql: SELECT FA_LMT_CCY as "Currency", SUM(FA_LMT_AMT * 0.0015) as "Revenue", SUM(FA_LMT_AMT) as "Volume" FROM %EXIMTRX%.FAEF_MASTER WHERE FA_LMT_CCY IS NOT NULL GROUP BY FA_LMT_CCY
